title: Sofia River
summary:
The Sofia is a river of northwestern Madagascar. It flows through the Sofia Region. The source is at the Tsaratanana Massif at an altitude of 1784 metres. It has a length of 328 kilometres (204 mi).
Its mouth is in the Indian Ocean in the Boriziny-Vaovao District (Port-Bergé).


== References ==
